name: Wells Fargo Attune World Elite Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: $200 cash rewards after spending $1,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 4% cash rewards on self-care (gyms, fitness studios, salons, spas)
4% cash rewards on sports, recreation, and entertainment (theme parks, golf, sporting events)
4% cash rewards on pet care (veterinarians, pet stores)
1% unlimited cash rewards on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 reimbursement for stolen/damaged cell phones ($25 deductible)

other_benefits.name: 0% intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR on purchases for 12 months

notes: Unique 4% categories (self-care, sports/recreation, pet care) not commonly found on other cards. Strong for wellness and pet owners.
